metadata.source_engine: V5.10 Exposure Context Risk Gradient Analysis
metadata.robustness_source_engine: V5.11 Risk Gradient Robustness & Stability Audit
metadata.purpose: Find market contexts where the fixed V5.10 risk gradient is more or less effective without changing any rule.

evidence.reason: V5.12 audits conditional validity only; no gradient, threshold, mapper, exposure, ETF, or trade change.

summary.key_read: Risk gradient has conditional value: it is stronger in crowded and early-cycle contexts, but many splits have small samples, so this remains a research explanation layer.
